intro: Color adorable animal friends in a lush jungle with your own colors!
description:
The 'Crayon' series, responsible for children's creativity worldwide, is back with a mysterious jungle theme, 'Crayon Jungle,' going beyond cars, dinosaurs, and animals! In this series, you can meet wild animals hidden throughout the jungle, including brave tigers, playful gorillas, long-necked giraffes, and cute sloths hanging from trees. 

Unleash your children's imagination with an intuitive interface that anyone can easily enjoy without complicated controls, and a variety of colors that perfectly capture the smooth texture of real crayons. Feel the animals you carefully colored come to life, experiencing a sense of accomplishment and emotional stability at the same time. Start your exciting wildlife adventure right now with 'Crayon Jungle,' a safe and creative digital sketchbook that you can unfold anytime, anywhere!
